backstory.original: Sheila is the compassionate heart of a group of young friends whisked away to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. She reluctantly took on the role of Thief, using her Cloak of Invisibility to move unseen. Sensitive and loyal, Sheila strives to keep her loved ones safe, especially her younger brother, Bobby. Her supportive spirit is a powerful force as they journey together in search of a way back home.
backstory.display: 希拉和一群年轻朋友被突然卷入了《龙与地下城》的魔法世界中，他是这群人里的热心肠。她不情愿地承担了盗贼的角色，利用她的隐形斗篷来悄无声息地移动。希拉敏感且忠诚，她努力保护自己所爱的人，尤其是她的弟弟鲍比。在他们共同寻找回家之路的旅程中，她支持他人的精神是一种强大的力量。

description.original: Sheila turns invisible and deals 1 hit to the closest enemy.
description.display: 希拉隐身并对最近的敌人发动 1 次攻击。

description.original: Sheila turns invisible and attacks each enemy.
description.display: 希拉隐身并攻击每一个敌人。

longDescription.original: Sheila turns invisible for a short while and attacks each enemy.
longDescription.display: 希拉短暂隐身并攻击每一个敌人。

description.desc: Sheila increases the damage of all Good Champions by $amount%.
希拉使所有善良勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

tipText.original: Sheila's inherently good nature supports other good Champions in the formation.
tipText.display: 希拉的善良天性会支持阵型中的其他善良阵营的勇士。

description.desc: Every time Sheila attacks, the enemies become less coordinated, opening them up to more critical hits. For each attack, increase the Critical Hit Chance of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)%, and increase their Critical Hit Damage by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking additively up to $max_stacks times and resetting every time you change areas.
每次希拉发动攻击，敌人的协调性就会降低，使他们面临更多的暴击。每次攻击时，所有勇士的暴击率增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，暴击伤害增加 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，最多以加算方式堆叠 $max_stacks 次，并在你每次变更区域时重置。
Sheila increases the damage bonus of Kind Heart by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中勇士的总属性值为 78 或以下时，希拉会使善良之心的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila teams up with a bunch of underestimated heroes.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉与一群被低估的英雄组成了团队。

description.desc: Sheila increases the damage bonus of Kind Heart by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with an age of 20 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位年龄小于等于 20 岁的勇士，希拉会使善良之心的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila's youthful friends are a force to be reckoned with.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉年轻的朋友们是一股不可小觑的力量。

description.desc: Sheila increases the damage bonus of Kind Heart by $amount% for each Female or Non-Binary Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位女性或非二元性别勇士，即使希拉的善良之心伤害加成提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila's allies prove there's power in solidarity.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉的盟友们证明了团结就是力量。

description.desc: Sheila can help scavenge up to $(current_scavenge_cap sheila_potion_reagent_scavenger floor) additional Potion Reagents when killing bosses. While this cap is not reached, Sheila has a $amount% chance of scavenging $amount_per_drop Potion Reagents each time a boss is defeated. The cap increases by $cap_increase_per_day every day.

conditions.desc: ^^Potion Reagents Scavenged: $(stat_value sheila_reagents_collected 0 none) ($(stat_value sheila_reagents_collected_this_adventure 1 none) this adventure)

description.desc: 击杀首领时，希拉可以帮助收集最多 $(current_scavenge_cap sheila_potion_reagent_scavenger floor) 瓶额外的药剂材料。没有达到此上限时，每次击败一名首领，希拉有 $amount% 的几率收集 $amount_per_drop 瓶药剂材料。此上限每天增加 $cap_increase_per_day。

conditions.desc: ^^已回收药剂材料：$(stat_value sheila_reagents_collected 0 none)（$(stat_value sheila_reagents_collected_this_adventure 1 none) 此冒险）

tipText.original: Sheila has a chance to uncover Potion Reagents with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 希拉有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现药剂材料，且上限每天都会提高。

description.desc: Sheila's base and ultimate attacks frighten her targets. Frightened enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage from critical hits, stacking multiplicatively up to 8 times per enemy.
希拉的基础攻击和杀招会使她的目标恐惧。被恐惧的敌人额外承受 $(not_buffed amount)% 的暴击伤害，该效果以乘算方式堆叠，每个敌人最多叠加 8 次。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila's attacks frighten her targets, leaving them vulnerable to critical attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉的攻击会恐吓她的目标，使它们更容易受到暴击。

description.desc: Sheila's base and ultimate attacks enrage her targets. The damage enraged enemies take increases by 15% every 2 seconds, stacking multiplicatively up to 30 times. The stacks reset when the enemy takes out their anger by attacking a Champion.
希拉的基础攻击和杀招会激怒她的目标。被激怒的敌人受到的伤害每 2 秒增加 15%，最多乘算堆叠 30 次。当敌人通过攻击勇士来发泄他们的愤怒时，层数将重置。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila's attacks anger her opponents, making them take additional damage until they strike back.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉的攻击会激怒她的对手，使他们在反击之前受到额外的伤害。

description.desc: Sheila gains the Control role. Sheila's base and ultimate attacks confuse her targets for 3 seconds. Confused enemies are stunned, take $amount% additional damage, and face the other direction.
希拉获得控制角色。希拉的基础攻击和杀招能在 3 秒内迷惑目标。被迷惑的敌人会被晕眩，承受 $amount% 的额外伤害，并面向其他方向。

specializationDescription.original: Sheila's attacks confuse her foes, halting their advance for a few seconds and causing them to take additional damage.
specializationDescription.display: 希拉的攻击会迷惑她的敌人，使他们停止动作几秒钟，并且受到额外的伤害。

description.original: I have to help my little brother. That's what big sisters do.
description.display: 我得去帮我弟弟。这就是当姐姐的该做的事。

description.original: Come on, everyone! We can't give up now! What would Dungeon Master say?
description.display: 快走，各位！我们还不能放弃！地下城主会怎么说呢？

description.original: Any friend of Bobby is a friend of mine.
description.display: 鲍比的朋友就是我的朋友。

description.original: We have to help those villagers. They can't defend themselves!
description.display: 我们必须帮助那些村民。他们没有自卫能力！

description.original: Well, I lost us a chance to get home, but gained a friend!
description.display: 好吧，我失去了让我们回家的机会，但我们交到了一个朋友！

description.original: They can't dodge so easily with their boot laces tied together!
description.display: 把他们的鞋带系在一起，他们就没那么容易躲闪了！

effects.description: Increases the Critical Hit chance bonus of Sheila's Invisible Cloak ability by $amount%

description.original: It would be a shame if their armor fell off right as they charged, huh?
description.display: 如果他们在冲锋的时候盔甲掉了下来，那可就太糟糕了，对吧？

effects.description: Increases the Critical Hit damage bonus of Sheila's Invisible Cloak ability by $amount%

description.original: We'll need all the help we can get if we want to make it back home.
description.display: 如果我们想回家，就需要广交天下好友。

description.original: With friends like mine, I know we'll make it through anything!
description.display: 有了像我这样的朋友，我们一定能一起克服任何困难！

description.original: You can do lots of tricky things when no one can see you!
description.display: 当没有人能看到你的时候，你可以做很多事情！

description.original: Venger's minions won't even know what hit them.
description.display: 复仇者的手下甚至都不会知道自己是怎么被打中的。

description.original: I'm going to join the drama club at school when we get home!
description.display: 等我们回到家，我要去学校参加戏剧社团！

description.original: If this world is testing us, I'll have to study extra hard to pass.
description.display: 如果这个世界是在考验我们，那我就得加倍努力才能通过考验。

description.original: I trust my friends, and they trust me! We'll always be together!
description.display: 我信任我的朋友，他们也信任我！我们会永远在一起的！

description.original: You'd think they would have learned by now.
description.display: 我以为他们已经学到教训了呢。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Sheila's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Maybe I'll grow into it?
description.display: 也许以后我穿就合身了？

description.original: Perfect for a day at the amusement park!
description.display: 去游乐园玩一天穿这个最合适了！

description.original: Dungeon Master did a great job picking this out for me.
description.display: 地下城主的眼光真不错，给我挑了这一条。

description.original: Now I'm ready for anything this world can throw at me.
description.display: 现在我准备好迎接这个世界对我的一切挑战了。

description.original: Hey, they're getting away! Better hurry, Bobby!
description.display: 嘿，它们要跑了！你最好快点，鲍比！

description.original: Eric says he found these in the jungle. They're kind of cute!
description.display: 埃里克说这些是他在丛林里发现的。它们还挺可爱的！

description.original: Bobby! You forgot to open Hank and Uni's presents!
description.display: 鲍比！你忘记打开汉克和独角的礼物了！

description.original: Thanks, guys. I haven't seen Bobby that happy in a long time.
description.display: 各位，谢谢你们。我好久没有见过鲍比那么高兴了。

description.original: Oh no, not another tear!
description.display: 噢，不，又扯开了一道口子！

description.original: I'll be more careful with this one.
description.display: 我会更加小心爱护它的。

description.original: When I put on the hood, I vanish! Watch!
description.display: 我一戴上兜帽就会消失！看着吧！

description.original: I'll be like a ghost. Venger will never find me now.
description.display: 我会像幽灵一样。这下复仇者绝对找不到我了。

description.original: These old things are ready to fall apart.
description.display: 这旧玩意都快要散架了。

description.original: That's much better! No more tripping!
description.display: 这好多了！再也不会绊倒了！

description.original: These boots were made for adventuring, and that's just what I'll do!
description.display: 这些是为冒险而设计的靴子，而我正是要去冒险！

description.original: I'll be as quiet as a mouse, and ten times more dangerous.
description.display: 我会像老鼠一样安静，而且比老鼠危险十倍。

description.original: It lost its color weeks ago.
description.display: 它几周前掉色了。

description.original: As long as it works, I won't complain.
description.display: 只要它还能用，我都不会抱怨。

description.original: Who knew green and purple could go so well together?
description.display: 谁能想到绿色和紫色这么搭？

description.original: I feel so light with this on, like I could even dance on the clouds!
description.display: 戴上这个我感觉很轻盈，仿佛连在云端跳舞都能做到！

description.original: Ouch! It keeps poking me!
description.display: 哎哟！它老是戳我！

description.original: One of these can help keep anything in place.
description.display: 一枚这样的别针能帮你固定住任何东西。

description.original: This keeps my cloak from falling off no matter what dangers we face.
description.display: 这能让我的斗篷不管遇到什么危险都不会掉下来。

description.original: The less I have to worry about myself, the more I can focus on Bobby.
description.display: 我越不用为自己操心，就越能专心照顾鲍比。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CHA score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Sheila is the compassionate heart of a group of young friends whisked away to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. She reluctantly took on the role of Thief, using her Cloak of Invisibility to move unseen. Sensitive and loyal, Sheila strives to keep her loved ones safe, especially her younger brother, Bobby. Her supportive spirit is a powerful force as they journey together in search of a way back home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Sheila is a Support and Debuff Champion who boosts Good-aligned Champions, improves critical hits, and collects Potion Reagents from defeated bosses.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 希拉和一群年轻朋友被突然卷入了《龙与地下城》的魔法世界中，他是这群人里的热心肠。她不情愿地承担了盗贼的角色，利用她的隐形斗篷来悄无声息地移动。希拉敏感且忠诚，她努力保护自己所爱的人，尤其是她的弟弟鲍比。在他们共同寻找回家之路的旅程中，她支持他人的精神是一种强大的力量。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 希拉是一位支援型和减益勇士，她能够增强善良阵营的勇士，提升暴击效果，并从被击败的首领那里收集药剂材料。

display.name: 看不见的打击
display.description: 希拉隐身并对最近的敌人发动 1 次攻击。

original.long_description: Sheila turns invisible for a short while and attacks each enemy.

display.long_description: 希拉短暂隐身并攻击每一个敌人。

original.name: Potion Reagent Scavenger
original.tip_text: Sheila has a chance to uncover Potion Reagents with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.

display.name: 药剂材料回收商
display.tip_text: 希拉有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现药剂材料，且上限每天都会提高。

original.name: Youthful Allies
original.specialization_description: Sheila's youthful friends are a force to be reckoned with.

display.name: 年轻的盟友
display.specialization_description: 希拉年轻的朋友们是一股不可小觑的力量。

original.name: A Rosy Outlook
original.specialization_description: Sheila's allies prove there's power in solidarity.

display.name: 乐观的前景
display.specialization_description: 希拉的盟友们证明了团结就是力量。

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领

display.name: 铜之心

display.name: 金之心
display.description: 好吧，我失去了让我们回家的机会，但我们交到了一个朋友！

original.description: They can't dodge so easily with their boot laces tied together!

display.name: 无形优势

effects.description: 希拉的“隐形斗篷”技能的暴击伤害加成增加 $amount%

original.name: Making Friends
original.description: We'll need all the help we can get if we want to make it back home.

display.name: 交朋友
display.description: 如果我们想回家，就需要广交天下好友。

original.name: Better Friends
original.description: With friends like mine, I know we'll make it through anything!

display.name: 更好的朋友
display.description: 有了像我这样的朋友，我们一定能一起克服任何困难！

original.name: Mischief Maker
original.description: You can do lots of tricky things when no one can see you!

display.name: 捣蛋鬼
display.description: 当没有人能看到你的时候，你可以做很多事情！

original.name: Sneaky Saboteur
original.description: Venger's minions won't even know what hit them.

display.name: 狡猾破坏者
display.description: 复仇者的手下甚至都不会知道自己是怎么被打中的。

original.name: Actor
original.description: I'm going to join the drama club at school when we get home!

display.name: 演员
display.description: 等我们回到家，我要去学校参加戏剧社团！

original.name: Scholar
original.description: If this world is testing us, I'll have to study extra hard to pass.

display.name: 学者
display.description: 如果这个世界是在考验我们，那我就得加倍努力才能通过考验。

original.name: Best Friends
original.description: I trust my friends, and they trust me! We'll always be together!

display.name: 最好的朋友
display.description: 我信任我的朋友，他们也信任我！我们会永远在一起的！

original.name: Old Tricks
original.description: You'd think they would have learned by now.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Sheila's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 老把戏
display.description: 我以为他们已经学到教训了呢。

effects.description: 使希拉的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Oversized Dress
original.description: Maybe I'll grow into it?

display.name: 偏大的连衣裙
display.description: 也许以后我穿就合身了？

original.name: Fitted Flared Dress
original.description: Perfect for a day at the amusement park!

display.name: 合身的喇叭裙
display.description: 去游乐园玩一天穿这个最合适了！

original.name: Pretty Purple Dress
original.description: Dungeon Master did a great job picking this out for me.

display.name: 漂亮的紫色连衣裙
display.description: 地下城主的眼光真不错，给我挑了这一条。

original.name: Garb of the Benevolent Thief
original.description: Now I'm ready for anything this world can throw at me.

display.name: 乐善好施盗贼装束
display.description: 现在我准备好迎接这个世界对我的一切挑战了。

original.name: Runaway Present
original.description: Hey, they're getting away! Better hurry, Bobby!

display.name: 逃跑的礼物
display.description: 嘿，它们要跑了！你最好快点，鲍比！

original.name: Happy Hoppers
original.description: Eric says he found these in the jungle. They're kind of cute!

display.name: 快乐的跳跳菇
display.description: 埃里克说这些是他在丛林里发现的。它们还挺可爱的！

original.name: Mystery Gifts
original.description: Bobby! You forgot to open Hank and Uni's presents!

display.name: 神秘礼物
display.description: 鲍比！你忘记打开汉克和独角的礼物了！

original.name: A Friendly Surprise
original.description: Thanks, guys. I haven't seen Bobby that happy in a long time.

display.name: 友好的惊喜
display.description: 各位，谢谢你们。我好久没有见过鲍比那么高兴了。

original.name: Patchy Rags
original.description: Oh no, not another tear!

display.name: 打着补丁的破布
display.description: 噢，不，又扯开了一道口子！

original.name: Mended Mantle
original.description: I'll be more careful with this one.

display.name: 补过的披风
display.description: 我会更加小心爱护它的。

original.name: Cloak of Invisibility
original.description: When I put on the hood, I vanish! Watch!

display.name: 隐形斗篷
display.description: 我一戴上兜帽就会消失！看着吧！

original.name: Cloak of Perfect Concealment
original.description: I'll be like a ghost. Venger will never find me now.

display.name: 完美隐藏斗篷
display.description: 我会像幽灵一样。这下复仇者绝对找不到我了。

original.name: Poorly Made Boots
original.description: These old things are ready to fall apart.

display.name: 做工糟糕的靴子
display.description: 这旧玩意都快要散架了。

original.name: Just Right Boots
original.description: That's much better! No more tripping!

display.name: 刚刚好的靴子
display.description: 这好多了！再也不会绊倒了！

original.name: Adventuring Boots
original.description: These boots were made for adventuring, and that's just what I'll do!

display.name: 冒险靴
display.description: 这些是为冒险而设计的靴子，而我正是要去冒险！

original.name: Boots of Silent Passage
original.description: I'll be as quiet as a mouse, and ten times more dangerous.

display.name: 静步靴
display.description: 我会像老鼠一样安静，而且比老鼠危险十倍。

original.name: Sad Little Sash
original.description: It lost its color weeks ago.

display.name: 悲伤小肩带
display.description: 它几周前掉色了。

original.name: Functional Sash
original.description: As long as it works, I won't complain.

display.name: 实用的肩带
display.description: 只要它还能用，我都不会抱怨。

original.name: Bright Belt
original.description: Who knew green and purple could go so well together?

display.name: 鲜艳的腰带
display.description: 谁能想到绿色和紫色这么搭？

original.name: Waistguard of Grace
original.description: I feel so light with this on, like I could even dance on the clouds!

display.name: 优雅护腰
display.description: 戴上这个我感觉很轻盈，仿佛连在云端跳舞都能做到！

original.name: Danger Pin
original.description: Ouch! It keeps poking me!

display.name: 危险别针
display.description: 哎哟！它老是戳我！

original.name: Safety Pin
original.description: One of these can help keep anything in place.

display.name: 安全别针
display.description: 一枚这样的别针能帮你固定住任何东西。

original.name: Stylish Clasp
original.description: This keeps my cloak from falling off no matter what dangers we face.

display.name: 时尚的扣子
display.description: 这能让我的斗篷不管遇到什么危险都不会掉下来。

original.name: Clasp of Protection
original.description: The less I have to worry about myself, the more I can focus on Bobby.

display.name: 保护扣
display.description: 我越不用为自己操心，就越能专心照顾鲍比。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位感知大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CHA score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位魅力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%
使所有中立阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
